doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statute 735 ILCS 5/9-209 and 5-day notice requirement are genuine, but the email service prohibition language and "conformed text effective 2024" designation cannot be verified as authentic statutory text.
